utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all 5 keys. Now check if each is fully specified per the format details:
- health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Provided with separate physical and mental plans and costs. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. Provided home_contents with plan name and cost. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. Provided with plan name and cost. Fully specified.
- additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. Provided as null (i.e., none). This does not fulfill the requirement to specify services with costs; thus not fully specified.
- total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided monthly_cost and annual_cost; also includes monthly_savings (extra but acceptable). Fully specified.
Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four specific items by exact plan name: PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical health), LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health), EliteHome Premium Coverage (home contents), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel). I located each of these names in the ground-truth ratings under their respective categories and extracted the exact numeric ratings provided.
